title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at PGIMER

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at PGIMER
jsonLd.description:
PGIMER, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Medical Officer for our Meerut operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About PGIMER:
PGIMER is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PGIMER!
